name: Mastech Digital, Inc.
business: Our business involves the delivery of professional services and is labor-intensive. We operate through IT Staffing Services and Data and Analytics Services segments. Our revenues are highly dependent on clients located in North America, with approximately 54% coming from financial services clients.

exposures.sentence: Our business involves the delivery of professional services and is labor-intensive.
Our Data and Analytics Services segment markets a multi-year service offering known as a Center of Excellence.
We use artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies in our operations and services.

A significant number of organizations are choosing to migrate their IT business applications to advanced technologies, such as artificial intelligence, cloud services, data science-based solution, mobility, and social analytics.
Security breaches and other disruptions could compromise our information and expose us to liability, which would cause our business and reputation to suffer.
Risks posed by climate change may materially increase our compliance costs and adversely impact our profitability.
Pandemics, epidemics or other outbreaks of diseases have had and may in the future have a material adverse impact upon our business, liquidity, results of operations and financial condition.
